experiment_title: FeCl₃与铁粉反应及产物鉴定实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="FeCl₃与铁粉反应及产物鉴定实验" goal="研究FeCl₃与铁粉反应生成物，并通过KSCN和氯水检验反应产物中的Fe²⁺和Fe³⁺离子" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="measuring_cylinder_1" type="measuring_cylinder" capacity="10mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="20mL" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" capacity="20mL" />
      <Component id="spatula_1" type="spatula" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="pipette_1" type="pipette" />
      <Component id="stopper_1" type="stopper" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="FeCl3_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Fe_powder" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="KSCN_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="chlorine_water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" reagent="FeCl3" volume="2 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="measuring_cylinder_1" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Fe" tool="spatula_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="stopper_1" vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_3" />
      <Stir vessel="test_tube_1" id="step_4" />
      <Wait time="20s" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="KSCN" tool="dropper_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="observe color change and record" id="step_7" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="test_tube_1" to_vessel="test_tube_2" tool="pipette_1" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="Cl2" tool="dropper_1" id="step_9" />
      <Wait time="observe color change and record" id="step_10" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>
